requirement_topic.en: EMC and Wireless Approval (ANRT) for Power Banks with Integrated Electronics
requirement_topic.zh: 集成电子元件移动电源的EMC与无线核准（ANRT）
requirement_topic.zht: 整合電子元件行動電源的EMC與無線核准（ANRT）

summary.en: Power banks (portable battery packs with integrated charging circuitry, USB outputs, and possibly a display) sold in Morocco fall under the general electrical-product import-conformity regime administered by the Ministry of Industry; EMC behaviour is assessed against NM standards that adopt the corresponding IEC/CISPR EMC standards (Morocco does not operate an EU-style standalone EMC Directive with a separate CE-style mark, but uses IEC-based NM references). Crucially, if the power bank has ANY wireless function (Qi wireless charging output, Bluetooth state-of-charge indicator, NFC), it becomes radio equipment and requires approval/agrément from ANRT (Agence Nationale de Réglementation des Télécommunications) before import and sale; ANRT enforces permitted frequency bands and equipment type-approval. Note Morocco is 220 V / 50 Hz single-phase, the same 50 Hz frequency as China, so mains-frequency assumptions transfer, but the radio-approval body and accepted test references differ.
summary.zh: 在摩洛哥销售的移动电源（集成充电电路、USB输出，可能含显示屏的便携式电池组）受工业部管理的一般电气产品进口符合性制度约束；EMC性能依据采用相应IEC/CISPR EMC标准的NM标准评定（摩洛哥不实行欧盟式独立EMC指令及单独的CE式标志，而使用基于IEC的NM引用）。关键在于：若移动电源具有任何无线功能（Qi无线充电输出、蓝牙电量指示、NFC），即成为无线电设备，须在进口和销售前取得ANRT（国家电信监管局）的核准/agrément；ANRT执行允许频段及设备型号核准。注意摩洛哥为220V/50Hz单相，与中国同为50Hz频率，故市电频率假设可沿用，但无线核准机构及接受的测试引用不同。
summary.zht: 在摩洛哥銷售的行動電源（整合充電電路、USB輸出，可能含顯示幕的便攜式電池組）受工業部管理的一般電氣產品進口符合性制度約束；EMC性能依據採用相應IEC/CISPR EMC標準的NM標準評定（摩洛哥不實行歐盟式獨立EMC指令及單獨的CE式標誌，而使用基於IEC的NM引用）。關鍵在於：若行動電源具有任何無線功能（Qi無線充電輸出、藍牙電量指示、NFC），即成為無線電設備，須在進口和銷售前取得ANRT（國家電信監管局）的核准/agrément；ANRT執行允許頻段及設備型號核准。注意摩洛哥為220V/50Hz單相，與中國同為50Hz頻率，故市電頻率假設可沿用，但無線核准機構及接受的測試引用不同。

standards_or_laws: NM standards adopting IEC/CISPR EMC references (e.g. CISPR 32 / CISPR 35 equivalents) — IMANOR, electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia/IT equipment
ANRT equipment agrément / type-approval regime — Agence Nationale de Réglementation des Télécommunications — mandatory for radio equipment
Law No. 24-96 on posts and telecommunications (as amended) — legal basis for ANRT radio-equipment approval in Morocco

summary.en: China's domestic EMC requirements use GB/T 9254.1-2021 (emissions, IT/multimedia equipment Class B) and GB/T 17618-2015 (immunity). Products with wireless functions require SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) type approval administered by MIIT, which is specific to Chinese radio allocations and protocol implementations. Chinese GB/T EMC reports and SRRC approval are domestic instruments and are NOT recognised by ANRT or under the Moroccan import-conformity regime; a Chinese power bank's SRRC radio approval does not transfer to Morocco and a separate ANRT agrément is required for the same wireless feature.
summary.zh: 中国国内EMC要求采用GB/T 9254.1-2021（IT/多媒体设备B类辐射）和GB/T 17618-2015（抗扰度）。含无线功能的产品须取得由工业和信息化部管理的SRRC（国家无线电管理委员会）型号核准，具体适用于中国无线电分配和协议实现。中国GB/T EMC报告及SRRC核准属国内文件，不被ANRT或摩洛哥进口符合性制度认可；中国移动电源的SRRC无线核准不可转移至摩洛哥，同一无线功能须另行取得ANRT agrément。
summary.zht: 中國國內EMC要求採用GB/T 9254.1-2021（IT/多媒體設備B類輻射）和GB/T 17618-2015（抗擾度）。含無線功能的產品須取得由工業和信息化部管理的SRRC（國家無線電管理委員會）型號核准，具體適用於中國無線電分配和協議實現。中國GB/T EMC報告及SRRC核准屬國內文件，不被ANRT或摩洛哥進口符合性制度認可；中國行動電源的SRRC無線核准不可轉移至摩洛哥，同一無線功能須另行取得ANRT agrément。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254.1-2021 — Information technology equipment — Radio disturbance characteristics — Part 1: Class B equipment (SAC/SAMR)
GB/T 17618-2015 — Information technology equipment — Immunity characteristics — Limits and methods of measurement (SAC)
SRRC type approval — State Radio Regulation of China, MIIT — required for wireless products sold in China

gap.en: For non-wireless power banks the EMC gap is mostly documentary — Morocco accepts IEC/CISPR-based EMC evidence, so an IEC/CISPR 32/35 test report is generally usable, whereas a domestic-only GB/T 9254 report may need re-issuing in IEC/CISPR format with French/Arabic documentation. The hard, distinctively Moroccan gap is wireless: any Qi/Bluetooth/NFC function triggers mandatory ANRT agrément, which is entirely separate from China's SRRC and does not transfer; the exporter (through the importer) must file an ANRT type-approval application, confirm the product transmits only in ANRT-permitted bands, and obtain approval before the goods clear customs and are sold. Power banks designed for the Chinese market should be checked for any frequency/protocol that is not permitted under ANRT rules.
gap.zh: 对于非无线移动电源，EMC差距多为文件性——摩洛哥接受基于IEC/CISPR的EMC证据，故IEC/CISPR 32/35测试报告一般可用，而仅国内的GB/T 9254报告可能需以IEC/CISPR格式并附法语/阿拉伯语文件重新出具。摩洛哥特有的硬性差距在于无线：任何Qi/蓝牙/NFC功能均触发强制ANRT agrément，与中国SRRC完全独立且不可转移；出口商（经进口商）须提交ANRT型号核准申请、确认产品仅在ANRT允许频段发射，并在货物清关销售前取得核准。面向中国市场设计的移动电源应核查是否存在ANRT规则下不允许的频率/协议。
gap.zht: 對於非無線行動電源，EMC差距多為文件性——摩洛哥接受基於IEC/CISPR的EMC證據，故IEC/CISPR 32/35測試報告一般可用，而僅國內的GB/T 9254報告可能需以IEC/CISPR格式並附法語/阿拉伯語文件重新出具。摩洛哥特有的硬性差距在於無線：任何Qi/藍牙/NFC功能均觸發強制ANRT agrément，與中國SRRC完全獨立且不可轉移；出口商（經進口商）須提交ANRT型號核准申請、確認產品僅在ANRT允許頻段發射，並在貨物清關銷售前取得核准。面向中國市場設計的行動電源應核查是否存在ANRT規則下不允許的頻率/協議。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — wireless functions require ANRT agrément (type-approval) before import and sale; EMC conformity to NM standards adopting IEC/CISPR references is required within the Ministry of Industry import-conformity regime; Morocco does not use an EU-style CE mark
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — GB/T 9254.1 EMC compliance required; SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless products sold in China (administered by MIIT)

source.publisher: ANRT — Agence Nationale de Réglementation des Télécommunications

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Power banks are assessed for EMC under NM standards adopting IEC/CISPR references within Morocco's Ministry of Industry import-conformity regime; Morocco does not use an EU-style CE mark. The decisive Morocco-specific obligation is ANRT agrément for any wireless function (Qi, Bluetooth, NFC) — China's SRRC approval does not transfer and a separate ANRT type-approval is mandatory before import and sale. Chinese GB/T 9254 and SRRC documents are not standalone Moroccan conformity evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 移动电源在摩洛哥工业部进口符合性制度下，依据采用IEC/CISPR引用的NM标准评定EMC；摩洛哥不使用欧盟式CE标志。摩洛哥特有的决定性义务是任何无线功能（Qi、蓝牙、NFC）须取得ANRT agrément——中国SRRC核准不可转移，进口销售前须另行取得ANRT型号核准。中国GB/T 9254及SRRC文件不能作为摩洛哥独立符合性证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 行動電源在摩洛哥工業部進口符合性制度下，依據採用IEC/CISPR引用的NM標準評定EMC；摩洛哥不使用歐盟式CE標誌。摩洛哥特有的決定性義務是任何無線功能（Qi、藍牙、NFC）須取得ANRT agrément——中國SRRC核准不可轉移，進口銷售前須另行取得ANRT型號核准。中國GB/T 9254及SRRC文件不能作為摩洛哥獨立符合性證據。
